content: You appear to be stuck on [Survey the new system completely. Scan ALL locations. Priority: find dockable stations. Document everything — resources, anomalies, faction presence, station services. If stations exist, note which ones and what they might sell. We desperately need a station that sells equipment modules (ice harvester, gas harvester, survey scanner).] in phase active for 15 minutes. Assess your current situation and either continue or abandon and replan.
